# John D. Rockefeller interview, 1917-1920

Authors: John D. Rockefeller ( Interviewee ) , David Freeman Hawke , William O. Inglis

Summary: The records consist of transcripts of a series of interviews conducted between 1917 and 1920 by William O. Inglis, a reporter for the New York WORLD. The interviews were granted for the purpose of producing an officially-sanctioned biography of Rockefeller, but Inglis was unable to produce a publishable manuscript

Archival Material , English , 1917

OCLC Number / Unique Identifier: 164038117
